title: ReShaped
description: Adds a radial menu to quickly switch between block shape variants and introduces many new shapes.
body:
![Title banner top](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c24bbc080fcc5a0d9a6533eb1c97b78b0d09f06.png)
[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?color=158000&label=downloads&prefix=+%20&query=downloads&url=https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/reshaped&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/reshaped) [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?color=f16436&label=downloads&prefix=+%20&query=downloads.total&url=https://api.cfwidget.com/1463309&logo=curseforge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/reshaped) [![Open Source License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/F-3-R-R-3/reshaped-1.20.1?label=Open%20Source&logo=github)](https://github.com/F-3-R-R-3/reshaped-1.20.1) ![Fabric 1.20.1](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fabric-1.20.1-DBD0B4?logo=fabricmc&logoColor=black)
ReShaped adds a radial menu that allows you to quickly and intuitively switch between different block shape variants, avoiding unnecessary inventory hassle. It also introduces a large collection of additional shape variants, giving builders more flexibility and control when designing structures. | ![DISCLAIMER: WIP top banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/960e20f9c64406a23a58be4c8d11abc617a474f0.png) **Work in Progress:** Features and content may change at any time and may break existing worlds. **Do not use this mod in survival yet** (recipes aren't implemented and there may be game-breaking bugs). Suggestions and bug reports are welcome on the [GitHub page](https://github.com/F-3-R-R-3/reshaped-1.20.1/issues). ![DISCLAIMER: WIP bottom banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5eed5ecc8bb4d7f7c64c9da4eccaeda44dc41e58.png) | | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ![Features banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2132a5a816f48ff0fab4cfa5c1e0e2c24d474b84.png) | Quick-to-use radial menu | | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | The radial menu displays all available shape variants of the block you are currently holding in your main hand and lets you swap between them instantly.
Default keybind: Left Alt![Image of the radial menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abbfbed18a4b8065ece13be26d92f7b782d009e9_0.webp) | | Automatically generated shape variants for vanilla and modded blocks | | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Includes vertical slabs, vertical stairs, steps, corner blocks, and more. Additional block types, such as panel blocks, are planned for the future. ![Some possible block combinations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8feefc95304d2ef2a2fffe259fdf22c011ac6641.png) Example with another mod installed (Create mod in this case): ![All blocks when the Create mod is installed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ccbb67a0f9955fd4716b1807fcc48f9cb7ca58b.png) Quickly preview all available blocks in creative mode using: `/reshaped place_all` | | Mixable blocks | | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | | Almost all block shapes are mixable, allowing the use of multiple materials within a single block. ![Mixed blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b33aa78aa40521cda29b0e3c71d80cb59700b1c8.png) | ![More info banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/044618c1288f95f47ac733911080aa931627e9f1.png)
Planned features - Bug fixes - Additional block types - Connected textures compatibility - Auto-generated recipes - Other Minecraft versions (including Forge and a 1.21 release) - ~~Public GitHub repo~~ (since Feb 21) - ~~Transparent block support~~ (added in V0.2) - ~~Improved tooltips for the radial menu~~ (added in V0.2) - ~~Config screen~~ (added in V0.1) - ~~Fix missing block drops~~ (added in V0.1) - ~~Fix missing tool requirements~~ (added in V0.1)
Requirements | Mod | Relation | | --------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ | | [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) | required | | [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) | required | | [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) | optional, needed to access the mod's config screen |
Mod compatibility The mod automatically generates its block variants and should be compatible with almost any mod. If you find any incompatibilities, report them on the [GitHub page](https://github.com/F-3-R-R-3/reshaped-1.20.1/issues).
Credits ## Code contributors [![Contributors](https://contrib.rocks/image?repo=F-3-R-R-3/reshaped-1.20.1)](https://github.com/F-3-R-R-3/reshaped-1.20.1/graphs/contributors) ## Bug Reporters Thanks to everyone who reported bugs and helped improve the mod. ## Inspiration - [Create: Copycats+](https://modrinth.com/mod/copycats) - [Clutter No More](https://modrinth.com/mod/clutter-no-more)
![mod title bottom image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f335bddfd8afe90ae6363cc679390c6939d7c97.png)
